ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model (e.g., decision tree, neural network) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose and capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features of the dataset (e.g., number of features, feature types) */,
  "target_variable" TEXT /* Target variable of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created or uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this visualization corresponds to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the visualization represents */,
  "visualization_config" TEXT /* Configuration used to generate the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_visualizations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being reviewed */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model these metrics belong to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, ROC-AUC) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which access is granted */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance was recorded */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "training_config" TEXT /* Configuration used to train the model */,
  "training_results" TEXT /* Results of the training process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint that was called */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the request */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
